{{Quote|This "fighter" is nothing more than a big, fast, flying bomb. It carries an explosive payload to a target. End of story. And, most likely, end of target.|Description of a M4|<ref name="Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide">[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance: Prima's Official Strategy Guide|''Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance'': Prima's Official Strategy Guide]]</ref>}}
The '''TIE Experimental M4''', also known as the '''TIE Bomb''', was a guided missile based on [[TIE series/Legends|TIE Series]] technology and a part of the [[TIE Experimental Project]].

==Characteristics==
A modified [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] built by an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] research project led by [[Director/Legends|Director]] [[Lenzer]] under the command of [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin]], the M4 was designed as a cruise missile for destroying [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ships]] and [[Space station/Legends|space stations]]. With wing panels taken directly from the [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE/sa bomber]] and a similar central pod and wing struts, the TIE M4 was loaded with enough explosives to detonate with five times the explosive force of a kamikaze [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE/LN starfighter]].

With an oversized booster employed in addition to the standard [[Twin ion engine/Legends|Twin Ion Engines]], the TIE Experimental M4 had greater linear acceleration than a [[TIE/d "Defender" Multi-Role Starfighter/Legends|TIE/D Defender]] and as much maneuverability as a standard TIE Fighter. As a guided missile, the TIE M4 had no defensive weaponry. Like the other TIE Experimentals, the M4 was remotely controlled by a modified [[Beta-class ETR-3 escort transport|''Beta''-class ETR-3 escort transport]].

==History==
[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] forces only known encounter with the M4 occurred when the Empire executed a retaliatory strike against the cruiser [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']]. ''Liberty's'' fighter squadrons were scrambled in defense, and they managed to save the ship from destruction.

After the destruction of the hangar ship ''[[Sardis]]'' and space platform [[Obsidian (XQ1 Platform)|''Obsidian'']], no TIE Experimental fighters were seen again.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' {{1st}}
